question: ABCDEFGHIJ is a regular 10-gon with center Y and circumradius 7. Let Z be the circumcircle of polygon ABCDEFGHIJ. Circle N is the reflection of circle Z across point G. Let Q be the reflection of circle N through point E. Let K be the reflection of circle Q through point D. Let P be the inversion of point A in circle K. Point R is the reflection of point G across segment HF. Let V be the line through point A perpendicular to segment HF. Let O be the midpoint of segment PY. Point L is the reflection of point O across line V. What is the distance between points L and R? Express your answer as a decimal number rounded to 2 decimal places.
